articles.title: Ancelotti's doubt: "Who do young Italians learn from? Great foreigners no longer come to Italy"
articles.summary: Objectively horrible season for Italian football. First the elimination from the World Cup play-offs, for the third time in a row, then yesterday the official announcement of being out of all the European competitions that count.

articles.title: Serie A, matchday 33 starts this evening: the complete programme

This evening Sassuolo-Como and Inter-Cagliari will kick off the 33rd matchday of Serie A. Below is the complete programme:

FRIDAY 17 APRIL
Sassuolo-Como 18.
